narrative:
Twinsburg 5-B (precinct in Summit County) has 895 registered voters, with 48.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 38.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 26.5 percentage points.
